channel.title: Jamieoliver (mela-rss)
channel.description: Auto-curated recipes from Jamieoliver (mela-rss), ready to import into Mela.

item.title: Golden chicken & garlicky beans
item.description: 2 servings · PT20M

item.title: Sticky orange chicken
item.description: Beautifully juicy Sticky orange chicken served with sweet potato mash, crispy rosemary and dressed watercress – a delicious dinner in just 20 minutes! — 2 servings · PT20M

item.title: Carbonara crouton salad
item.description: Bright and fresh with the tastiest Carbonara-inspired croutons, this quick and easy salad can be rattled together in just 20 minutes. Yes please! — 2 servings · PT20M

item.title: Pea, paneer & potato curry
item.description: This vibrant green curry, made with paneer, peas and potatoes, is a real joy to make and eat – and it only takes 20 minutes. Double win! — 2 servings · PT20M

item.title: Air-fryer arancini
item.description: Made with a handy packet of ready-made rice and cooked in an air-fryer, this tasty arancini recipe could not be easier – and all in 20 minutes flat! — 2 servings · PT20M

item.title: Apple, tuna & cucumber pitta pockets
item.description: Shake-up your usual sarnie fillings with this fresh apple, cucumber and tuna combo – your kids will love it! — 1 serving · PT5M

item.title: Chicken & sweetcorn potato salad
item.description: Made with a lemon and pesto dressing, this zingy chicken salad is the perfect lunch box filler and a great way to use up leftover roast chicken. — 2 servings · PT10M

item.title: Basil Viennetta
item.description: This is the ultimate nostalgic dessert. Try this easy, crowd-pleasing Basil Viennetta recipe featuring layers of rich chocolate and creamy mascarpone. — 12 servings

item.title: One-pan moussaka
item.description: Try this simple moussaka recipe with a rich meat and aubergine filling, crispy potato top and a bubbling Parmesan crust. — 6 servings

item.title: Seadas saganaki
item.description: Experience the ultimate salty-sweet crunch with these crispy filo pastry triangles packed with gooey melted cheese, fresh thyme and warm honey. — 4 servings

item.title: Tropical fruit portable pavlova
item.description: Perfectly portable and equally beautiful, this tropical fruit pavlova made with mango, passion fruit and lime is perfect for any summer picnic. — 12 servings · PT2H

item.title: Summer cocktail cake
item.description: The most spectacular summer cocktail cake inspired by the beautiful flavours of British-favourite, Pimm's – super-fresh, this is summer on a plate! — 12 servings · PT50M

item.title: Savoury s'mores
item.description: Brilliant for your next summer adventure, these quick, easy and fun savoury s'mores are the perfect nibble – experiment with your favourite combos! — 8 items · PT20M

item.title: Grogu's Steak sandwich
item.description: Bring the galaxy's ultimate comfort food home! Watch Pedro Pascal and Jon Favreau cook Jamie Oliver's 5-ingredient steak sandwich (aka Grogu's Steak Sandwich). Get the full recipe, ingredients list, and cooking tips. — 2 servings · PT14M

item.title: Mocktail ice cubes
item.description: Inspired by popular cocktails, these mocktail ice cubes are a super-fun way to keep hydrated. Click into a glass and top up with soda. Simple! — 15 items · PT10M

item.title: Picnic pie & pickles
item.description: Make your next picnic super-special with this perfectly portable picnic pie, made with a slow-cooked onion, cheese and potato filling. Delicious! — 10 servings · PT2H

item.title: Matcha fro-yo
item.description: Quick, easy and refreshing, this matcha-fro-yo with a fresh strawberry drizzle and sesame snaps is the perfect sweet treat on a hot summers day. — 4 servings · PT20M

item.title: Hot honey BBQ chicken
item.description: The sweetness and spice of hot honey, combined with those beautiful BBQ flavours is what makes this chicken recipe so special – totally delicious! — 6 servings · PT1H30M

item.title: Ultimate crab sandwich
item.description: Bring back fond memories of days spent by the coast with this ultimate crab sandwich, made with saffron mayo, cucumber ribbons and pickled samphire. — 1 serving · PT15M

item.title: Loaded Caesar salad dip
item.description: Enjoy all the flavours of a Caesar salad as a beautiful sharing platter – perfect for entertaining or a cosy night in! — 4 servings · PT15M

item.title: Easy energy balls
item.description: Looking for the perfect pick-me-up after a gym session? These Easy energy balls made with simple ingredients will help your body recover naturally. — 24 items · PT25M

item.title: Italian-style tuna salad
item.description: Celebrate humble tinned tuna in this delicious Italian-style salad, served with bang-in-season tomatoes on toast and beautiful marinated anchovies. — 4 servings · PT20M

item.title: Hot crispy rostis & smoked salmon
item.description: Made with waves of quality wild smoked salmon, these hot and crispy rostis topped with a fried egg and asparagus ribbons are totally delicious. — 2 servings · PT20M

item.title: Sumptuous sardine spaghetti
item.description: Sardines are the perfect tinned fish – oily, delicious and so full of flavour! Enjoy them in this simple pasta dish for a quick and easy dinner. — 2 servings · PT15M

item.title: Supergrains mackerel salad
item.description: Mackerel is a real nutritional powerhouse, packed with those heart-healthy Omega-3 oils - enjoy it in this beautifully simple grains salad. — 4 servings · PT20M

item.title: Quick tuna melt fishcakes
item.description: These super-tasty fishcakes celebrate beautiful skipjack tuna, tinned at its absolute best. Topped with melty cheese, they're a real family favourite! — 4 servings · PT20M

item.title: Salsa verde
item.description: Made with top-quality anchovies, this easy-to-make salsa verde is a great way to add big flavour to all kinds of dishes. Delicious! — 8 servings · PT10M

item.title: Pasta all’anciova e muddica
item.description: Discover Gennaro's traditional Sicilian bucatini dish with salted anchovies, rich tomato, and crunchy toasted breadcrumbs. — 4 servings

item.title: Paniscia
item.description: A traditional bean and sausage risotto from Piemonte. Try Gennaro's Paniscia – a nutritious, soul-warming meal perfect for a glass of red wine. — 4 servings

item.title: Buchteln
item.description: Fluffy Northern Italian brioche buns filled with sweet apricot jam, give it a go! — 14 items

item.title: Ultimate barbecue brekkie
item.description: Pick and choose whichever elements excite you to make up your own perfect brekkie or brunch – what a feast! — 4 servings

item.title: Sesame chicken burgers
item.description: A sizzling sesame burger served in homemade burger buns with gochujang yoghurt and pickled veg – yes please! — 4 servings · PT30M

item.title: Veg-tastic barbecue mezze
item.description: Mighty veg do wonderful things when grilled, blackened, charred and blistered. Here Jamie shares his favourite ways to enjoy them! — 6 servings

item.title: Grilled fish tacos & stone fruit salsa
item.description: Sizzling scallops, trout and mackerel topped with spicy stone fruit salsa, soured cream and herbs, all served in corn tortillas – what a feast! — 4 servings · PT45M

item.title: Herby grilled veg, halloumi skewers & pancakes
item.description: Beautiful grilled veg, golden halloumi skewers and pancakes, plus a nutty herby dressing, yoghurt and pops of pomegranate. Delicious! — 8 servings · PT45M

item.title: Spiced paneer kofte
item.description: These kofte are addictive - a crisp, just-charred exterior, meltingly soft inside, and perfectly spiced. Paired with a watermelon salad – delicious! — 4 servings · PT1H

item.title: Super surf & turf mixed grill
item.description: Barbecued to perfection and coated in herby butter, this surf and turf recipe made with chicken, chorizo, prawns, mussels and clams is a real treat! — 8 servings · PT45M

item.title: Jerk pork & seared cabbage
item.description: Jerk is traditionally cooked over pimento wood in Jamaica, but that isn’t always practical here in the UK. So instead, I use bay leaves on branches. — 2 servings · PT1H30M

item.title: Herby leg of lamb & creamy beans
item.description: Coated in a herby pistachio crumb, this leg of lamb & creamy beans recipe with leeks and tomatoes is perfect for feeding a crowd. — 10 servings · PT1H25M

item.title: Spiced chicken kebabs & butter sauce
item.description: Inspired by the incredible flavours of butter chicken, these grilled tandoori-style kebabs with a flavour-packed sauce are fit for a feast. — 12 servings · PT1H45M

item.title: Perfect steak & chargrilled salad
item.description: This perfect steak & chargrilled salad recipe can be cooked on the barbecue in just 20 minutes flat – yes please! — 2 servings · PT20M

item.title: Buddy's chicken Caesar
item.description: Cooked to perfection on the barbecue, this epic chicken Caesar salad recipe is definitely one to try – incredible! — 8 servings · PT1H30M

item.title: Sizzling lamb lollipops
item.description: Beautifully juicy hot-from-the-barbecue lamb cutlets, cooked Roman-style and served-up Greek-style. Yes please! — 4 servings · PT30M

item.title: Mexican-style pizza
item.description: One of Oaxaca’s signature dishes, Tlayudas (Mexican-style pizzas) are deeply tied to the region’s Indigenous and mestizo culinary traditions. — 2 servings · PT2H15M

item.title: Sunshine stew & herb-stuffed sea bream
item.description: Boasting 5 portions of veg, this beautiful sunshine stew & sea bream recipe is both healthy and tasty in equal measure. — 4 servings · PT50M

item.title: Thai-style mushroom & tofu broth
item.description: Enjoy a steaming bowl of this hot and sour mushroom broth. A simple, plant-based dish that delivers a real flavour hit! — 6 servings · PT25M

item.title: Easy fish & chips
item.description: This recipe heroes frozen and store-cupboard ingredients, and is budget-friendly too! Fish Friday never looked better. — 2 servings · PT45M

item.title: Prawn & cheese tacos
item.description: Want a prawn taco recipe up your sleeve? Look no further. Taken from Karla Zazueta's debut cookbook Norteña, these are ideal for any north Mexican feast. — 12 items

item.title: Scruffy veg lasagne
item.description: Making the most of frozen veg, this lovely one-pan lasagne is a joy to make and eat. — 6 servings · PT45M

item.title: Cheat’s mango ice cream
item.description: Rattled together in a couple of minutes, you won’t believe how tasty and refreshing this cheat’s ice cream recipe is. — 8 servings · PT5M
